---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Yulun Chen"
date: "2026-07-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)


train_x <- read.table("C:/Users/斯图加特/Desktop/X_train.txt")
test_x  <- read.table("C:/Users/斯图加特/Desktop/body_acc_x_test.txt")


if (ncol(train_x) != ncol(test_x)) {
  stop(sprintf("列数不同：train %d 列，test %d 列，无法合并", ncol(train_x), ncol(test_x)))
}


X <- rbind(train_x, test_x)
```
